text: For the mechanical & plumbing package we recommend Summit MEP Contracting Ltd (F-MP-01) at a corrected HK$6,110,500 — the lowest-priced bid with a clean public record, sitting just below the historical band's low end. Pacific Mechanical Services Ltd is HK$450,500 cheaper at HK$5,660,000 but carries an unpaid adjudication determination under SOPO — a fatal flag: we recommend against awarding to Pacific regardless of price. Evergreen Plumbing & Drainage Ltd priced HK$6,423,550 with a clean record.
